scripts.preinstall: node -e "const userAgent = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || process.env.NPM_CONFIG_USER_AGENT; if (!userAgent?.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
